description: Stay protected, rain or shine, with the Repel Windproof Compact Umbrella — your reliable companion wherever life takes you. Crafted for strength and convenience, this lightweight umbrella features a robust 9-rib fiberglass frame and vented double canopy to prevent blowouts during heavy wind. Its Teflon-coated, waterproof canopy repels water and provides UV protection, drying fast for easy storage in your bag, backpack, or car. With a smooth auto open and close button, you’ll be ready in seconds—even with one hand. At just 11.5 inches long, this travel umbrella is a practical fit for handbags and small spaces, yet offers broad coverage. Whether you’re commuting, traveling abroad, or gifting a thoughtful everyday essential, the Repel Umbrella delivers unmatched style, strength, and functionality for both men and women.
